name: Midia (Mussels) Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Long grain rice, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mussels and set aside.
2. Saute onions in olive oil until soft.
3. Add rice and mix thoroughly.
4. Add salt, pepper, spices, currants, and pine nuts. Mix well.
5. Add water, bring to a boil, and cook for 10 minutes at medium heat.
6. Add cleaned mussels, removed from their shells, and mix thoroughly.
7. Cook about 10 more minutes.
8. Serve at room temperature, mounded in a dish surrounded by fresh lemon slices.
9. This can be used as an appetizer or as a side dish.
